hero.title: APOLO 27
hero.description: We are a team of students from INTEC, Dominican Republic, competing in the NASA Human Exploration Rover Challenge. Second place worldwide in 2024 and the first Latin American team to reach the podium. We design and build rovers for future space exploration.

sponsors.subtitle: Driving our mission
sponsors.title: Those who make the dream possible

social.subtitle: Join our mission
social.title: Follow Our Journey
social.description: Be part of our community and join us as we take the Dominican Republic to space

footer.title: Be part of the mission
footer.subtitle: Join APOLO 27 and help us inspire the next generation of space explorers

genesis.description: Our first rover. The beginning of a dream.

triumph.description: The rover that took us to the world podium.

legacy.description: Our most advanced rover to date.

countdown.eventPassed: The event has already taken place!

items.title: THE ORIGIN
items.text: Our journey began in 2019 with a groundbreaking achievement: becoming the first university division team from our country to compete in the NASA Rover Challenge.

items.title: PERSEVERANCE IN ADVERSITY
items.text: Despite the challenges of the global pandemic, our resilience shone through. Lessons learned paved the way for our historic 'System Safety Award' victory.

items.title: EXPANDING OUR IMPACT
items.text: 2022 marked a turning point with the launch of our interactive 'STEM Tour,' culminating in winning the prestigious 'Engagement Award.'

items.title: A HISTORIC YEAR
items.text: A year of Dominican dominance! Major improvements earned us the 'Most Improved' and 'Team Spirit' awards, cementing our place in history.

items.title: SETTING THE STANDARD
items.text: Rising from 2023's successes, we reached new heights in 2024. Our hard work earned us the coveted 'Overall Award (2nd place)' and the 'Spirit Award,' showcasing excellence and unity.

left.title: OUR HP DIVISION
left.text: We continue to push the boundaries in 2025 with our HP (Human Powered) Division. Focused on innovation, physical performance, and teamwork to conquer any challenge on extraterrestrial terrains.

right.title: PIONEERING RC MISSIONS
right.text: Our RC team embarks on its first year with bold ideas and even bolder engineering. We're ready to make our mark in the world of remote-controlled exploration.

year2026.title: THE ADVENTURE CONTINUES
year2026.text: This year, Team Apolo 27 embarks on a new adventure. With fresh faces, bold ideas, and the same passion that defined our history, we are ready to write the next chapter.
